## Summary

Describe the problem and the chosen solution.

## Change type

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Security
- [ ] Breaking change

## Validation

- [ ] `make check`
- [ ] Browser regression, when UI behavior changed
- [ ] Documentation updated
- [ ] No credentials, production data, or internal infrastructure references included

## Compatibility and risk

Describe API, schema, Agent compatibility, security, rollout, and rollback impact.
